TensorFlow tf.nn.softmax_cross_entropy_with_logits requires labels and logits to have same rank >= 2 (e.g., [batch, classes]), but input shape [4] is 1D. Paddle's soft_label=True expects label shape matching logits, but both frameworks require at least 2D for valid softmax cross entropy. Fix: upgrade to 2D shape [1,4] to satisfy batched semantics.

Paddleзҡ„softmax_with_cross_entropyеңЁsoft_label=Trueж—¶иҰҒжұӮlabelдёҺlogitsеҗҢshapeпјҢдҪҶTFзҡ„softmax_cross_entropy_with_logitsй»ҳи®ӨеӨ„зҗҶone-hotжҲ– probability labelsпјӣеҪўзҠ¶дёҚеҢ№й…ҚжәҗдәҺPaddleиҫ“еҮәдёә(1,1)иҖҢTFдёә(1,)пјҢйңҖз»ҹдёҖaxis=-1е№¶зЎ®дҝқlabelжҳҜжҰӮзҺҮеҲҶеёғдё”ж·»еҠ return_softmax=FalseжҳҫејҸжҺ§еҲ¶гҖӮ

PaddlePaddle API paddle.nn.functional.softmax_with_cross_entropy does not accept 'labels' parameter; it uses 'label' instead. Also, soft_label must be explicitly set to True for soft labels matching TF's behavior, and axis must align with class dimension (default -1 works for last dim).

Paddleзҡ„softmax_with_cross_entropyеңЁsoft_label=Trueж—¶иҰҒжұӮlabelдёҺlogitsеҗҢshapeпјҢдҪҶTFзҡ„softmax_cross_entropy_with_logitsй»ҳи®ӨжҢүaxis=-1и®Ўз®—пјҢиҫ“еҮәshapeдёәlogits.shape[:-1]гҖӮй”ҷиҜҜжәҗдәҺPaddleжңӘжҢҮе®ҡaxisеҜјиҮҙе№ҝж’ӯжҲ–йҷҚз»ҙиЎҢдёәе·®ејӮпјӣйңҖжҳҫејҸи®ҫaxis=-1е№¶зЎ®дҝқTFдёҺPaddleиҫ“еҮәз»ҙеәҰдёҖиҮҙпјҢеҚіTFз»“жһңдёә(2,1)пјҢPaddleд№ҹеә”иҫ“еҮә(2,1)пјҢж•…PaddleйңҖдҝқжҢҒaxis=-1дё”дёҚж”№еҸҳshapeиҜӯд№үгҖӮ

Paddleзҡ„softmax_with_cross_entropyеңЁsoft_label=Trueж—¶иҰҒжұӮlabelдёҺlogitsеҗҢshapeпјҢдҪҶTFзҡ„softmax_cross_entropy_with_logitsй»ҳи®ӨжҢүaxis=-1и®Ўз®—дё”иҫ“еҮәshapeдёәlogits.shape[:-1]гҖӮй”ҷиҜҜжәҗдәҺPaddleжңӘжҢҮе®ҡaxisеҜјиҮҙе№ҝж’ӯжҲ–йҷҚз»ҙиЎҢдёәе·®ејӮпјӣеә”жҳҫејҸи®ҫaxis=-1е№¶зЎ®дҝқTFдёҺPaddleиҫ“еҮәз»ҙеәҰдёҖиҮҙпјҢеҚіTFиҫ“еҮә(2,1)пјҢPaddleйңҖеҢ№й…ҚгҖӮ

PaddlePaddle API paddle.nn.functional.softmax_with_cross_entropy does not accept 'labels' parameter; it uses 'label' instead. Also, soft_label=True is required when label tensor has same shape as logits (soft labels), otherwise it expects integer class indices. TensorFlow's labels correspond to Paddle's label with soft_label=True.
